ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the postal office */,
  "pin_code" INTEGER /* Pin code of the postal office */,
  "office_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office type */,
  "delivery_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delivery status */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the office belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the office belongs to */,
  "circle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circle the office belongs to */,
  "taluk" TEXT /* Taluk (sub-district) where the office is located */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* District name where the office is located */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State name where the office is located */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the office */,
  "fax_number" TEXT /* Fax number of the office */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the office */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the office location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the office location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the office (if any) */,
  "office_head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office head or manager */,
  "office_manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the office manager */,
  "office_manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the office manager */,
  "related_suboffice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related suboffice (if any) */,
  "related_headoffice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related headoffice (if any) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_offices_delivery_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("delivery_status_id") REFERENCES delivery_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_offices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_offices_office_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_head_id") REFERENCES office_heads ("head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_offices_circle_id FOREIGN KEY ("circle_id") REFERENCES circles ("circle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_offices_office_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_type_id") REFERENCES office_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_offices_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the division */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the division belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "circle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circle the region belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circles" (
  "circle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circle */,
  "circle_name" TEXT /* Name of the circle */,
  "circle_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the circle */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the circle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the circle information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the circle information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the office type */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the office type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office type information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delivery_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the delivery status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the delivery status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the delivery status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery status information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the delivery status information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office head */,
  "head_name" TEXT /* Name of the office head */,
  "head_email" TEXT /* Email of the office head */,
  "head_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the office head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office head information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office head information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role information was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "office_user" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the postal office */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office-user relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the office-user relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id", "user_id")
)
